arts.ttl: Amorim offers update on Hojlund’s Man Utd future ahead of Arsenal game: “We’ll see”
arts.sum: By: Ben Dixon This evening, an update has been offered as AC Milan await an answer over the future of Rasmus Hojlund. Manchester United’s game against Arsenal this weekend could be huge for Milan, with reports stating earlier today that Hojlund’s involvement, or lack of, could seal his future away from the Red Devils.
